title: You
content:
Here's to the world, the merry old world,
     To its days both bright and blue;
     Here's to our future, be it what it may,
     And here's to my best - that's you!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "You"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
